name: RustDeskServer-AiO
description:
Self-host your own RustDesk Server, it is free and open source.

This container includes both the RustDesk Server and the RustDesk Relay in one and starts it.

ports.name: TCP - RustDesk Server/Relay
ports.description:
Necessary default ports for the server:
TCP: 21115, 21116, 21118
UDP: 21116
Necessary default ports for the relay:
TCP: 21117, 21119

variables.name: Enable RustDesk Server
variables.description:
The server needs by default the following ports to work properly:
TCP: 21115, 21116, 21118
UDP: 21116

variables.name: Rust Desk Server Parameters
variables.description: Enter your extra start up parameters for the server here if necessary.

variables.name: Enabel RustDesk Relay
variables.description:
The relay needs by default the following ports to work properly:
TCP: 21117, 21119

variables.name: Rust Desk Relay Parameters
variables.description: Enter your extra start up parameters for the relay here if necessary.

variables.name: UID
variables.description: Only change when you know what you are doing!

variables.name: GID
variables.description: Only change when you know what you are doing!

variables.name: DATA_PERM
variables.description: Only change when you know what you are doing!

variables.name: UMASK
variables.description: Only change when you know what you are doing!
